api_key.description: Tally personal access token, sent as a Bearer token. Generate one from Tally account settings. Never logged.

base_url.description: Tally API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only submissions submitted at or after this time are read.

page_size.description: Records per page for forms/workspaces/submissions (1-500 per Tally's documented max).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
